fields.Name: Nightwing
fields.Background: Richard Grayson was the only child of Mary and John Grayson. When he was a child his family was part of a traveling circus as trapeze artists but his parents were murdered by a mafia boss who had a grudge against the circus owner. Richard saw his parents fall to their deaths during their circus act and was soon taken in by Bruce Wayne who had also seen the incident. After a while he found out that Bruce Wayne was Batman and began working as Batmans sidekick Robin. When Richard eventually outgrew Robin he became his own hero called Nightwing and became the leader of the superhero team Teen Titans, later renamed just Titans.
fields.Strengths: Elite Acrobat: Due to his background as an acrobat Nightwing has incredible agility and is fast on his feet. Good Intellect: Due to his prior training with Batman Nightwing is a good tactician, and has very good problem solving skills and is a wonderful detective aswell as being multilingual. Extensive martial arts training: He has been trained since childhood in various fighting styles and has incredible stamina.
fields.Weaknesses: He is very stubborn and extremely independent causing him to very rarely ask for help even when it is needed. He is prone to overworking himself to the point of near collapse.
